'''kachala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:rabbet|rabbet]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-ch-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rabbet|rabbet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| kachala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæchælæth|kæchælæth]] || [[word:kæchælæj|kæchælæj]] || [[word:kæchælæsh|kæchælæsh]] || [[word:kæchælæ|kæchælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kachachalath|kachachalath]] || [[word:kachachalaj|kachachalaj]] || [[word:kachachalash|kachachalash]] || [[word:kachachala|kachachala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kachalath|kachalath]] || [[word:kachalaj|kachalaj]] || [[word:kachalash|kachalash]] || [[word:kachala|kachala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kachaflath|kachaflath]] || [[word:kachaflaj|kachaflaj]] || [[word:kachaflash|kachaflash]] || [[word:kachaflaf|kachaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kachalatha|kachalatha]] || [[word:kachalaja|kachalaja]] || [[word:kachalasha|kachalasha]] || [[word:kachalaka|kachalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kachalath|kachalath]] || [[word:kachalaj|kachalaj]] || [[word:kachalash|kachalash]] || [[word:kachala|kachala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kachalathal|kachalathal]] || [[word:kachalajal|kachalajal]] || [[word:kachalashal|kachalashal]] || [[word:kachalakal|kachalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kachalathatha|kachalathatha]] || [[word:kachalajaja|kachalajaja]] || [[word:kachalashasha|kachalashasha]] || [[word:kachalaka|kachalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kachalathan|kachalathan]] || [[word:kachalajan|kachalajan]] || [[word:kachalashan|kachalashan]] || [[word:kachalakan|kachalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kachalathaoro|kachalathaoro]] || [[word:kachalajaoro|kachalajaoro]] || [[word:kachalashaoro|kachalashaoro]] || [[word:kachalakaoro|kachalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
